title: rhysolepis pusilla
intro: Rhysolepis pusilla, also known as the dwarf barrel cactus, is a small, globular cactus species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rhysolepis pusilla include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and treating various infections. Rhysolepis pusilla is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be dried and used as a powder for topical applications.
